Sit down and meditate for 15 minutes.
If you have never meditated before, try some guided meditation you can find online.
Write down one thing you feel grateful for.
Send a kind message to someone you care about.
Tidy one small area — a drawer, a shelf, a corner.
Put your phone down for 15 minutes.
Go to your local supermarket and buy one fruit to have as a snack.
Listen to one song you love.
Write down a place you want to visit this year.
Step outside, take 5 deep breaths and feel your heart rate.
Call or text someone you haven't spoken to in a while.
Prepare a simple meal or snack for yourself.
